# Source: https://support.google.com/mail/answer/8494?hl=en&co=GENIE.Platform=Desktop
# Query: 进口食品 中文标签 检验检疫

To open Gmail, you can sign in from a computer or add your account to the Gmail app on your phone or tablet. Once you're signed in, open your inbox to check your mail.
Sign in
- On your computer, go to
[Gmail](https://mail.google.com/). - Enter your Google Account email or phone number and password.
- If information is already filled in and you have to sign in to a different account, click Use another account.
- If you get a page that describes Gmail instead of the sign-in page, at the top right of the page, click Sign in.
Tip: If you sign in to a public computer, make sure to sign out before you leave the computer. Learn how to [sign in on a device that's not yours](/accounts/answer/2917834).
Fix sign-in issues with Gmail
If you forget your Gmail username or password, or you can’t access your account, [follow our guide to troubleshoot your issue](/mail/troubleshooter/2402620).
If you still can’t sign in, [recover your Gmail account](/mail/answer/7682439).
[Recover your account](https://accounts.google.com/signin/recovery)
